response.justification: The candidate is a strong polyglot developer with extensive experience in web technologies, but is a fundamental mismatch for this role. The position requires 5-10 years of dedicated C++ experience on Windows and domain knowledge in capital markets or fixed income. The candidate has less than one year of professional C++ experience from nearly a decade ago and no relevant financial domain expertise, failing to meet any of the mandatory requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior engineer with a polyglot background.
Strong knowledge of modern development practices like CI/CD, TDD, and containerization.
Demonstrated excellent communication skills through public speaking and workshops.
concerns: Critically insufficient C++ experience; only a brief 7-month role nearly a decade ago.
Complete lack of experience in the required capital markets or fixed income domains.
No demonstrated experience with C++ development on the Windows platform or with SQL Server/Oracle.
